---
title: "Priorities of the Fisheries<br>Integrated Modeling System<br>and how you can contribute"
subtitle: NOAA Library<br>Stock Assessment Seminar Series
author: "Kelli Johnson, NOAA Fisheries OST<br>kelli.johnson@noaa.gov<br>"
date: 2026/04/02
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["xaringan-themer.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      ratio: '4:3'
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      slideNumberFormat: "Page %current%"
---

layout: true
  
```{r xaringanthemer, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))
required_pkg <- c("xaringanthemer", "remotes", "webshot2", "xfun", "DiagrammeR", "FIMS")
pkg_to_install <- required_pkg[!(required_pkg %in%
                                   installed.packages()[, "Package"])]
if (length(pkg_to_install)) install.packages(pkg_to_install)
lapply(required_pkg, library, character.only = TRUE)

if (!"nmfspalette" %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]) {
  remotes::install_github("nmfs-ost/nmfspalette")
}
library(nmfspalette)

style_xaringan(

  base_font_size = "15px",
  text_font_size = "1.5rem",

  title_slide_background_color = unname(nmfs_cols("darkblue")),
  title_slide_text_color = unname(nmfs_cols("white")),
  title_slide_background_size = "cover",
  title_slide_background_image = file.path("static", "slideswooshver.png"),

  background_image = file.path("static", "slideswoosh.PNG"),
  background_size = "cover",
  background_color = unname(nmfs_cols("white")),

  header_font_google = google_font("Arimo"),
  header_color = unname(nmfs_cols("darkblue")),

  text_color = unname(nmfs_cols("darkblue")),
  # text_font_google = google_font("Carlito", "300", "300i"),
  text_slide_number_color = unname(nmfs_cols("lightteal")),

  code_font_google = google_font("Source Code Pro"),
  code_highlight_color = unname(nmfs_cols("medteal")),

  inverse_background_color = unname(nmfs_cols("processblue")),
  inverse_text_color = unname(nmfs_cols("supltgray")),

  footnote_font_size = "0.6em",
  footnote_color = unname(nmfs_cols("darkblue")),
  footnote_position_bottom = "10px",

  link_color = unname(nmfs_cols("medteal")),


  extra_css = list(
    ".remark-slide-number" = list(
      "font-size" = "0.4em",
      "font-weight" = "bold",
      "margin" = "0px 840px -2px 0px"),

    ".title-slide h1, h2, h3" = list(
      "text-align" = "right"), 
    
    ".hyperlink-style" = list(
      "color" = "blue",
      "text-decoration" = "underline"
    )
  )
)
```

.footnote[U.S. Department of Commerce | National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration | National Marine Fisheries Service]

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
options(htmltools.dir.version = FALSE)
```

<!-- Start of slides -->

---
# Outline

- The **S** in **S**ystem
- 🏛️ .hyperlink-style[[FIMS organization](https://noaa-fims.github.io/)] 🏛️
- Version history of <img src="static/FIMS_hexlogo.png" style="width: 100%; max-width: 30px;" /> package
- Priorities
- 🧑‍🤝‍🧑FIMS Family 🧑‍🤝‍🧑

---
# The S in System

<div style="display: flex;">
  <div style="flex: 0 0 60%; padding-right: 2%;">
    <!-- Left column content -->
  Connect the silos between
  <ul>
  <li>🧭East/West/North/South🧭</li>
  <li>data-limited and data-rich</li>
  <li>model inputs and model outputs</li>
  </ul>
  <img src="https://live.staticflickr.com/3816/11090497816_4dcf638be1.jpg" style="width: 100%; max-width: 300px;" />
  </div>
  <div style="flex: 0 0 40%;">
    <!-- Right column content -->
  Currently available tools  
```{r noaa-fims-architecture, echo=FALSE, out.width="90%", crop=TRUE}
DiagrammeR::grViz("
digraph flowchart {
  node [shape = rectangle]
  A [label = 'NOAA-FIMS']
  B [label = 'FIMS', color='blue']
  BB [label = 'FIMSRTMB']
  C [label = 'fishprior']
  D [label = 'ecosystemom']
  E [label = 'ecosystemdata']
  A -> B
  A -> BB
  B -> BB
  A -> C
  A -> D
  A -> E
  D -> E
  E -> B
}
"
)
```
</div>

---
# 🏛️ FIMS Organization 🏛️

* GitHub organization .hyperlink-style[https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS]
* Single Discussion board
  * .hyperlink-style[https://github.com/orgs/NOAA-FIMS/discussions]
  * In place of Slack, Discord, or Google Group
  * Please introduce yourself on .hyperlink-style[[Discussion #801](https://github.com/orgs/NOAA-FIMS/discussions/801)]

---
# FIMS package

* v0.0 (2021): approval from Science Board
* v0.1 (July 2023): modular C++ age-structured assessment framework
* v0.2 (December 2023): derived quantities and uncertainties; case studies
* v0.3 (January 2025): fit to lengths using an age-to-length-conversion matrix
* v0.4 (March 2025): fit to fishery-dependent indices of abundance
* v0.5 (June 2025): random effects backend
* v0.6 (July 2025): changes to names of derived quantities
* v0.7 (December 2025): refactor input and output
* v0.8 (January 2026): projections
* v0.9 (March 2026): time-varying weights and random recruitment deviations
* v0.10 (April 2026): fixes bugs in initializing models

---
# Priorities

## How do we decide priorities?

## What are our priorities?

## How will we meet out priorities?

---
# How do we decide priorities

* Requirements
* Features needed to match ASAP, BAM, SS3, WHAM case studies
* Use of new statistical/modeling methods
* Ease of use for users
* Benevolent dictator

---
# What are our priorities

* Timing
* Internal estimation of growth
* Sex
* Adding model families (e.g., surplus production and empirical dynamic models)

---
# How will we meet our priorities

* Code Club
* Contractors
* FIMS Implementation Team
* Interns (Google Summer of Code)
* University students
* **you**

---
# 🧑‍🤝‍🧑FIMS Family 🧑‍🤝‍🧑

👉 You, yes **you** 👈, can get involved in the FIMS community!

* Introduce yourself on our .hyperlink-style[[Discussion Board #801](https://github.com/orgs/NOAA-FIMS/discussions/801)]
* Assign yourself to a .hyperlink-style[[good first issue](https://github.com/NOAA-FIMS/FIMS/issues?q=state%3Aopen%20label%3A%22good%20first%20issue%22)]
* Join a .hyperlink-style[[FIMS Code Club](https://noaa-fims.github.io/about/calendar.html)] (monthly 3-hour coding/learning session)
* Engage with individuals from multiple disciplines
* Bring novel practices to all model types at once

---
# Thank you

👋 Welcome to the .hyperlink-style[[FIMS](https://noaa-fims.github.io/)] Team

<div style="text-align: center;">
  <img src="static/FIMS_hexlogo.png" style="width: 100%; max-width: 300px;" />
</div>

📩kelli.johnson@noaa.gov
